Therefore, completeness is set to false. Confidence in the field answer's relevance remains high given the excerpts align well with the content presented.

excerpts:
Getting every character out of the Apple keyword field
Separate keywords with commas and put no space after the comma. Apple's own example is Property,House,Real Estate. The only spaces belong inside a multi-word phrase like Real Estate. Every stray space is a character you don't get back, and over a dozen keywords that adds up to a lost term or two.
citations.title: Getting every character out of the Apple keyword field

excerpts:
Product Page Optimization and Custom Product Page Screenshot ...
Use Product Page Optimization when you want to improve your default App Store product page with a controlled test across regular store traffic. PPO lets you compare different screenshots, app icons, and app previews, then test up to three treatments against your original/current App Store listing.

excerpts:
App Store Subtitle Examples 2026: 20 Great Examples by ...
The 30-character limit is strict. This includes spaces. Anything longer will be truncated with an ellipsis. The limit forces brevity: you cannot write a full sentence. You have room for roughly 4 to 6 words, depending on average word length and spacing.
